name: Cologne
short_description: Race on multiple tracks in cosmic realms and cities. Fast machines, challenging levels, tough rivals and places you have never seen before. Climb to the top and race against other drivers around the world.
detailed_description:
Break the speed barrier. Defy gravity. Race through glowing tracks on alien worlds.


A high-velocity sci-fi racing game where you pilot neon-lit hoverbikes inside colossal transparent tunnels sprawled across distant planets.

⚡ Extreme speed

Push past the speed of sound as you accelerate through looping tracks and vertical tunnels that twist across alien landscapes.

Gravity-Defying Racing – Your vehicle sticks to the inner surface of massive semi-transparent tubes. Ride on the ceiling, spiral around corners, and dodge obstacles at breakneck speeds.

Neon-Slick Visuals – Inspired by retro-futuristic aesthetics, with glowing bikes, luminous tracks, and galactic vistas in the background.

Multiple Planets, Unique Tracks – Race across a variety of planets, each with different environmental effects, gravity, and visual themes.

🧪 Passion project

"Cologne" was my first released game — an experiment in speed and style, crafted with love for old-school sci-fi racers. The name might not make much sense, but the adrenaline rush sure will.
